disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A raised pigmented skin lesion on the upper back was snagged by a towel tonight and is now bleeding
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I dried off after a shower and caught a raised dark mole on my back with the towel. It tore a bit and it's been bleeding and spotting on the towel since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient reports the pigmented lesion has changed / grown over recent months
trigger_question_examples: Has the mole changed in size, shape or colour recently?
How long have you had it and has it looked different lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had it a while but I'm pretty sure it's got bigger and darker over the last few months — that's part of why I'm scared.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of severe blistering sunburns in adolescence (a melanoma risk factor)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a lot of sun exposure or bad sunburns in the past?
Any history of skin cancers or heavy sun damage?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I got some really bad blistering sunburns as a teenager, but I've never been told I had any skin cancer.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No known family history of melanoma or skin cancer
trigger_question_examples: Does anyone in your family have melanoma or skin cancer?
Any relatives with a history of skin cancers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no one in my family that I know of has had melanoma or skin cancer.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute severe health anxiety / panic reaction, with the patient seeking immediate reassurance
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
You sound very worried — what's going through your mind?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm panicking honestly — I'm convinced this is advanced cancer and I need to know right now or get it cut out tonight.
